overview: Golden Valley Integrated Campus (GVIC), established in 2009, is a private engineering and management institution located in Madanapalle, Annamayya District (formerly Chittoor), Andhra Pradesh. The college is known for its integrated approach, offering a variety of technical and professional programs within a single campus. It emphasizes a mix of academic learning and practical exposure, aiming to serve the educational needs of the Rayalaseema region.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE, New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA). Recognized by the Government of Andhra Pradesh.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, ME, Civil, IoT)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics + AP EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: MBA (Human Resource, Finance, Marketing, Systems, Big Data Analytics)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, VLSI & Embedded Systems, Structural Engg, Power Electronics)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / AP PGECET score

coursesAndFees.course: Diploma (Polytechnic) (Civil, ME, EEE, ECE, Computer Engineering)

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are strictly governed by the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling based on entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE scores. Counseling Code: GVIC.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; B.Tech Counseling: Tentatively July 2026.

campus.area: Acres of modern infrastructure on Kadiri Road
facilities: Central Library with Digital Resource Access
Separate In-campus Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transport (Fleet of buses covering Madanapalle and nearby areas)
campus.specialNote: The campus is situated in a quiet, pollution-free environment ideal for academic focus. It places significant emphasis on Campus Recruitment Training (CRT) and soft skills workshops starting from the third year to enhance students' corporate readiness.

contact.address: Kadiri Road, Angallu Post, Madanapalle, Annamayya District, Andhra Pradesh - 517325
